race.comment: RICH STAR (2) is chasing his fourth-straight win today and can keep the winning momentum going on the rain-affected surface. Sat on the good tempo and cleared out for a sound victory over 1000m at Grafton. Can take control early and prove hard to get past. LOVE RAT (5) racing well. Comes back in grade and trip after he rattled late to finish third over 1300m at Coffs Harbour in BM82 class. Well weighted today and has excellent credentials over this course and distance. Will be closing strongly. DECISIVE LASS (3) races well on rain-affected going and deserves another chance in this weaker contest. Taken back from the outside draw when he failed to get into the contest with an average seventh over 1175m at Grafton. Best form is over this trip and keep safe. SUPER FREDS (6) will find this more to his liking after running seventh over 1100m at Canterbury in BM72 grade. Was a dominant winner two-back at Scone. No surprise to see him bounce back.
